stories.headline: North Korea Pinned for $285M Drift Hack via Long-Game Social Engineering
stories.tldr: Investigators traced April's $285M Drift Protocol drain to DPRK-affiliated operators using pre-signed authorizations harvested over months.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: State-grade phishing has overtaken smart-contract bugs as DeFi's primary loss vector, forcing protocols to harden human ops, not just code.
the_details: Drift was drained on April 1 via hidden, pre-signed transaction authorizations rather than a contract exploit.
Attribution mirrors Lazarus playbook seen on Bybit in 2025; full April theft tally now exceeds $606M across 12 incidents.
Investigators say the social-engineering campaign ran for several months before triggering, targeting privileged signers.

stories.headline: White House Sets Mid-2026 Reveal for Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Architecture
stories.tldr: The administration will publish the framework for a U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve mid-year, ahead of the July regulatory report deadline.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A formal Treasury accumulation blueprint would lock sovereign Bitcoin demand into U.S. policy and pressure peer nations to follow suit.
the_details: Architecture targets a Treasury-led path to accumulate Bitcoin under a defined statutory framework.
Reveal lands before the comprehensive crypto regulatory report due in July 2026.
Move builds on the SEC-CFTC MOU and the GENIUS Act stablecoin rules already in implementation.

stories.headline: BTC-Dollar Inverse Correlation Hits 4-Year Extreme as DXY Cracks
stories.tldr: Bitcoin and the U.S. dollar are moving in near-perfect opposition, the most extreme inverse pairing in nearly four years.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: BTC is trading like a pure dollar-debasement hedge again, which sharpens its macro case but makes it hostage to every Fed and Treasury surprise.
the_details: BTC sits near $77K-$78K, up 13%+ in April, on track for its best monthly close in a year.
USDT supply has expanded by $5B during the rebound, fueling spot demand and offshore liquidity.
Last comparable BTC/DXY divergence preceded the 2022 macro regime shift; traders are watching DXY breakdown levels closely.

stories.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Targets 2026 Rollout to Slash Confirmation Times
stories.tldr: Solana's long-awaited Alpenglow consensus overhaul is now slated for 2026, promising faster finality and fewer outages.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Alpenglow is the network's pitch to institutional desks and ETF issuers that uptime risk — Solana's biggest knock — is finally fixable.
the_details: Alpenglow rewrites consensus to materially reduce block confirmation latency.
Upgrade lands as spot SOL ETFs cross $1B AUM and SOL consolidates between $77 and $94.
Reliability gains directly address the chain's history of liveness incidents that previously spooked TradFi allocators.

stories.headline: Plasma (XPL) Unlocks $10.1M Today, Releasing 3.73% of Circulating Supply
stories.tldr: Plasma is releasing 3.73% of circulating supply — about $10.1M of XPL — into the market on April 26.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A 3.7% same-day unlock is large enough to pressure price discovery and is a cleaner read on insider conviction than any roadmap update.
the_details: Unlock value pegged at $10.10M based on the morning XPL spot price.
Schedule lands during a thin weekend tape, amplifying any market-impact-style selling.
Watch for follow-through Monday as desks reset hedges around the new float.
